title: Maxi's JourneyMap Naturalist Icons
description: Bring Naturalist animals into your JourneyMap's Minimap! No more arrows, now proper Icons for all the animals found in Naturalist!
body:
No animal going unnoticed.

This resourcepack adds icons all current Animals found in the Naturalist Mod via JourneyMap mod, for you to watch the animals on your journey across sky, sea and land. Supports up-to-date Naturalist version.
  • JourneyMap mod
  • Naturalist mod

  1. Download Maxi's-JM+Naturalist-Icons.zip.
  2. Put it inside the folder resourcepacks of your Minecraft installation. An easy way to access this folder is via the ingame Options → Resource Packs, and click the bottom left button (Open Pack Folder).
  3. Select the Maxi's-JM+Naturalist-Icons resourse pack from the available packs ingame (Options → Resource Packs).
  4. Click Done.
  5. On JourneyMap Options, both minimap Preset and Fullscreen map, set Mob Display to Icons.

  • I can't see any Animal on my map
    For you to see the animals on your minimap/fullscreen map, you have to set Mob Display to Icons in your JourneyMap options. You have to set this for both presets and fullscreen map options.

  • I've set Mob Display to Icons but I still can't see any animal
    Make sure to have both the lastest JourneyMap and Naturalist versions for the resourcepack to work.

  • I have the correct JM version but I still don't see my animals
    Remember to Select (move to the right column) the correct resourcepack from your Available list on your game Options → Resource Packs.

  • How can I make the icons bigger?
    Just as seen above, aside from the Mob Display option is Mob Display Scale, you can set this number to your preference. Remember to set this number on the preset you will be using and/or on the fullscreen map.

Check out my other projects!
